form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at The Meadows over 600m in 35.23 last start, beating Bold Assail. Key chance again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at The Meadows over 600m in 35.23 last start, beating Bold Assail. Key chance again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Checked turning into front straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Shepparton to win by 2.5 lengths in 22.86, beating Bayini. Last start finished last in a Grade 5 on April 13 over 450m at Shepparton behind Whodat Jewel beaten 17 lengths (26.56). Hard to tip with any confidence.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th on April 13 over 595m at Sandown behind Pumping Magic beaten 2 lengths (35.26) in a Grade 5 NP. Forward showing expected.

form.formComment: At the last outing finished 5th in a Bottom Up - Grade 5 on April 15 over 500m at Bendigo behind Him Tarzan beaten 6 lengths (28.68). Looks a solid hope.

form.formComment: Has finished fifth at the last two runs, both at Shepparton, the latest when beaten 3.5 lengths behind Paw Manny over 450m. Others preferred on this occasion.

form.formComment: Looks close to another win after her success on March 16 at this track over 545m. Last start was fifth over 545m in 31.58, behind Doongalla Serena. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 6th on April 15 over 525m at The Meadows in a Grade 4/5. Happy enough to dismiss in this field.
